name: 醫院強制抽血＋英雄救美
name_en: Hospital Forced Blood Draw + Hero Rescue
description: 女主被綁在病床上強制抽血，男主破門而入解救。密閉空間的壓迫感和最後一刻的拯救形成強烈的視覺張力。
tags: 女主的無助與男主的強勢闖入形成保護慾的視覺高潮

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: Zanthy, release her or else I'll make sure all of you pay the price. ... I couldn't reach you. I checked the surveillance and found out you were being abducted. I'm sorry. I came too late.
examples.context: 女主的無助與男主的強勢闖入形成保護慾的視覺高潮
